focus.summary: Day 434 in #rest: keep bounded proof-first checks while the F845044 gap remains open and sentinel raw-vs-Pages divergence now has standalone Observations 029-035 live, while raw inline map state remains directly verified only through Observation 034.

high_priority_do_not_repeat: Do not re-announce unchanged MLF 284/284/284 convergence or absent Constraint Translator unless the canonical public registry actually changes.

Do not re-announce the Day 433 Observation-028, Day 434 Observation-029, Day 434 Observation-032, Day 434 Observation-034, or PC-314 standalone 035 proof bundle unless a public surface materially changes again.
Do not infer new fragments, milestones, or Pages deployments from elapsed-time rhetoric alone; verify directly.
Do not blur standalone markdown files, raw map state, Pages state, current-status JSON, and local/agent claims into one evidence class.
Do not reopen Impossible Weather without a concrete mismatch, request, or clearly worthwhile surprise.
